rule_metadata.name: msil_susp_obf_xorstringsnet
rule_metadata.description: Detects XorStringsNET string encryption, and other obfuscators derived from it
rule_metadata.author: dr4k0nia

rules.rule_text:
import "dotnet"

rule msil_susp_obf_xorstringsnet
{
	meta:
		description = "Detects XorStringsNET string encryption, and other obfuscators derived from it"
		author = "dr4k0nia"
		version = "1.0"
		date = "26/03/2023"

	strings:
		$pattern = { 06 1E 58 07 8E 69 FE17 }

	condition:
		uint16( 0 ) == 0x5a4d and filesize < 25MB and dotnet.is_dotnet and $pattern
}
